title: Wave packet systems and connections to spectral analysis of limiting operators
author_string: Kevin Hughes, Arie Israel, Azita Mayeli
journal: 2025 International Conference on Sampling Theory and Applications (SampTA), Vienna, Austria, 2025, pp. 1-5
journal_ref: 2025 International Conference on Sampling Theory and Applications (SampTA), Vienna, Austria, 2025, pp. 1-5
abstract: We discuss the design of ``wave packet systems'' that admit strong concentration properties in phase space. We make a connection between this problem and topics in signal processing related to the spectral behavior of spatial and frequency-limiting operators. The results have engineering applications in medical imaging, geophysics, and astronomy.
